JSON: {"displayName":"CIPP: Managed Windows 11 Devices","description":"Company-owned Windows devices with version numbers above 10.0.22000.50","platform":"windows10AndLater","rule":"(device.operatingSystemVersion -ge 10.0.22000.50) and \n(device.deviceOwnership -eq \"Company\")","assignmentFilterManagementType":"devices","GUID":"656be48b-46a6-4e83-8aca-26064502b434"}
